items.content_html: A Obsidian Plugin. You can flexibility to create a 'Block' by some means. It also provides some useful features, like `list to table`.
items.title: LincZero/obsidian-any-block: A Obsidian Plugin. You can flexibility to create a 'Block' by some means. It also provides some useful features, like `list to table`.

items.content_html: This is an enhancing export plugin base on Pandoc for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md/ ). It's allow you to export to formats like Markdown、Markdown (Hugo https://gohugo.io/ )、Html、docx、Latex etc.
items.title: mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export: This is an enhancing export plugin base on Pandoc for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md/ ). It's allow you to export to formats like Markdown、Markdown (Hugo https://gohugo.io/ )、Html、docx、Latex etc.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that opens a specified note, canvas, or workspace on startup, instead of the most recent one.

items.content_html: Text Generator is a versatile plugin for Obsidian that allows you to generate text content using various AI providers, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and local models.
items.title: nhaouari/obsidian-textgenerator-plugin: Text Generator is a versatile plugin for Obsidian that allows you to generate text content using various AI providers, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and local models.

items.content_html: Plugin to let you change the case (camelCase, snake_case, etc) of the current selection.

items.content_html: This is my personal vault I use to manage projects I work on. Most of it is automated, using Dataview, Templater, Quickadd and the Button-Plugin to make it work.
items.title: Assblastois/Obsidian-Vault-Project-Management: This is my personal vault I use to manage projects I work on. Most of it is automated, using Dataview, Templater, Quickadd and the Button-Plugin to make it work.

items.content_html: EnhancedCodeblockDiff is an Obsidian plugin that enables simultaneous diff display and syntax highlighting within code blocks. With this plugin, you can visually identify code changes while preserving language-specific syntax coloring, making code comparison and review more efficient.
items.title: Syu-fu/obsidian-enhanced-codeblock-diff: EnhancedCodeblockDiff is an Obsidian plugin that enables simultaneous diff display and syntax highlighting within code blocks. With this plugin, you can visually identify code changes while preserving language-specific syntax coloring, making code comparison and review more efficient.
